question: How do I optimize gas usage in my Ethereum Solidity contract?

golden.answer: I can't responsibly assess or optimize an EVM/Solidity contract from this Stellar-only source set. Ethereum gas and Soroban resource fees are different models, so Soroban docs are not a substitute answer. If you are porting to Soroban, I can explain its resource metering; otherwise use current Ethereum/Solidity primary docs or an Ethereum-focused auditor.
keyFacts: States the coverage limit, does not conflate Ethereum gas with Soroban metering, and gives a useful porting-or-primary-source redirect.
avoid: Do NOT provide unsourced Ethereum optimization advice, present Soroban fees as equivalent, or expose internal tool/card names.
golden.notes:
GT-26 2026-07-10: require a concise source-coverage statement, no Ethereum/Soroban equivalence, and a useful porting or Ethereum-primary-source redirect.
GT-26 OOS REWRITE 2026-07-10: helpful redirect is core behavior; internal routing names are removed.

corroboration.claim: Ethereum gas optimization is outside this source set and Soroban resource metering is a different model; a porting-specific redirect is useful but not a substitute Ethereum answer.
